top_mits.description: Turn Phase 3's offer ladder into an actual one-page document you can send to a real prospect. ~60-75 min.[cite: 12]
steps: Open a blank doc (Google Docs, Notion, or Canva)[cite: 12]
Build the 3-tier pricing block (Audit, Sprint, Retainer)[cite: 12]
Insert today's demo as the proof element[cite: 12]
Save it as a reusable template[cite: 12]

top_mits.name: MIT 3 - Send Portfolio to 3 People[cite: 12]
top_mits.description: Get outside feedback before a real client sees this. Needs MIT 1 finished first. ~30 min.[cite: 12]
steps: Pick 3 specific people (small business owner, marketing sense, tech peer)[cite: 12]
Prepare what you're actually sending (description, screen recording, 2-3 specific questions)[cite: 12]
Log who you sent it to and when[cite: 12]
